title: Verticalized empty states - forms
summary: Does a verticalized Forms empty state — with industry-relevant copy and imagery for Retail and Hospitality signups — increase 7-day activation over the existing banner?
hypothesis: We believe that replacing the current Forms empty state with a verticalized empty state for Retail and Hospitality signups will improve 7-day activation because showing industry-relevant copy and imagery at a high-visibility early-product surface should make Klaviyo feel more relevant to the customer's business without changing the underlying form-creation workflows. We will measure success using Activation 7D, and monitor form creation, blank form creation, enable-onsite-tracking clicks, template clicks, and guardrail metrics for regressions in the existing empty-state funnel to ensure no negative impact.
treatment_description: Verticalized Forms empty state banner, tailored copy/imagery for Retail and Hospitality signups

treatments.label: Treatment
treatments.description: Verticalized Forms empty state banner, tailored copy/imagery for Retail and Hospitality signups
